name: Harlow's School Bus
principals: Harlow Hageness (founder, deceased 2011); Jason, Jeremy, and Justin Hageness (second-generation owners/operators)
districts_or_customers: Multi-state contractor across ND, SD, MT, ID, WA; Vermillion SD location serves Dakota Valley School District area; routes range 6 to 100+ per contract
recent_news: Actively hiring drivers across multi-state footprint; uses Zonar GPS, Z Pass RFID, and onboard cameras (2024-2025).
fit_notes: Attractive larger family-owned multi-state platform (5 states) under 2nd-gen Hageness brothers; succession timing and multi-state scale make it a strategic regional add-on rather than a small tuck-in. Affiliated Harlow's Bus & Truck Sales adds dealer/parts angle.

name: Chamber's Bus Garage
principals: Mike Chambers (owner per source list); Jodi Strait (training/operations contact per CDL Knowledge)
districts_or_customers: Troy Area School District (Bradford County, PA); allocated 3 EPA Clean School Bus electric buses in Oct 2022 to serve Troy ASD
recent_news: Awarded 3 electric school buses via EPA Clean School Bus Program (Oct 2022) for Troy Area SD service; FMCSA authority active since April 1998 (DOT 745113).
fit_notes: Independent rural PA contractor (~38 buses) anchored on Troy ASD; participating in EPA EV transition is a positive operational signal. Single-district concentration limits standalone size but fits PA roll-up footprint.

name: Moore's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Likely Clintonville/Venango County PA area; no district contracts confirmed
recent_news: No web presence located; address 'Route 208, Clintonville PA 16372' returns Transerve Bus Service in searches, suggesting Moore's may be dormant, renamed, or absorbed.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm operating status; same Clintonville PA area address resolves to Transerve Bus Service. Needs direct phone/secretary-of-state verification before outreach. Possibly defunct, renamed, or merged.

name: A Plus School Bus Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade County Public Schools (M-DCPS approved private bus vendor); private, public, and charter schools in Miami-Dade
recent_news: Listed on M-DCPS approved private bus companies roster (2025); company markets 25+ years of operating experience.
fit_notes: Small Doral FL operator (HQ 8000 NW 56th St) on M-DCPS approved vendor list; useful Miami-Dade beachhead for FL roll-up. The Pembroke Pines listing (954 number) may be a separate but commonly identified entity. Verify exact corporate structure before approach.

name: H2O School Bus Trnsprtn Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely NYC DOE Office of Pupil Transportation (OPT) vendor pool serving Queens-area schools; not confirmed on official OPT lists from public search
recent_news: No recent news located; MerchantCircle listing unclaimed; secondary phone (646) 261-7039 listed at 4025 Hampton St, Elmhurst NY 11373.
fit_notes: Tiny Queens NY operator with minimal digital footprint; if active on an NYC OPT contract it could be a route-bolt-on, but NYC market is dominated by union contracts under OPT and recent NYCSBUS nonprofit consolidation, limiting tuck-in appeal. Verify operating status.
